name: Piccadilly Par 1
about: Piccadilly Par 1 is part of a multi-attraction entertainment venue called Piccadilly Palace. It offers indoor golf simulation as one of several activities available. The facility features 5 high-tech golf simulators with access to over 200 world-famous courses, providing a comprehensive indoor golf experience. The Par 1 section includes a full restaurant and bar, making it suitable for both playing and dining, and is designed for year-round play regardless of weather conditions. The venue also hosts events, leagues, and parties in its private or group simulator bays.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 200 world-famous golf courses
Full restaurant and bar available on-site
Can host private events and parties in simulator bays
Leagues and events available for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant available with snacks and food options

simulator_hardware.notes: 5 high-tech simulators mentioned, but brand not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full restaurant and bar available on-site, but it doesn't specify whether outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as this can vary depending on the simulator and software used.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Piccadilly Par 1 is part of a larger family-friendly entertainment venue that includes activities for all ages, including kids.
